tests.name: GPIO register write/read on PA0
tests.description: Verify GPIOA output data register write high/low and readback on PA0.
steps: Enable RCC AHB1 clock for GPIOA (set RCC_AHB1ENR bit 0)
Configure PA0 as output (GPIOA_MODER bits[1:0] = 01)
Set GPIOA_ODR bit 0 to drive PA0 high
Verify GPIOA_ODR bit 0 reads back as 1; on failure print 'FAIL: GPIO WRITE HIGH'
Clear GPIOA_ODR bit 0 to drive PA0 low
Verify GPIOA_ODR bit 0 reads back as 0; on failure print 'FAIL: GPIO WRITE LOW'
Print PASS and halt
prerequisites: Target provides RCC at 0x40023800 and GPIOA at 0x40020000
Debug print via ITM is optional
expected_results: ODR bit toggles reflect written values; test prints 'GPIO REG WR/RD TEST PASSED'

tests.name: GPIO falling-edge (negative) trigger enable on alternate pads
tests.description: Enable EXTI falling-edge triggers on alternate pads (0,2,4,6) and verify register bits set.
steps: For each pin in {0,2,4,6}, set EXTI_FTSR bit for that line
Verify EXTI_FTSR bit is set; on failure print 'FAIL: NEDGE ALT PAD'
Print PASS and halt
expected_results: EXTI_FTSR bits for pins 0,2,4,6 are set; test prints 'GPIO NEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED'

tests.name: GPIO negative-edge interrupt enable on PA1
tests.description: Configure PA1 as input, map to EXTI1, enable falling-edge interrupt, and verify configuration.
steps: Enable RCC AHB1 clock for GPIOA
Enable RCC APB2 clock for SYSCFG
Configure PA1 as input (GPIOA_MODER bits[3:2] = 00)
Route PA1 to EXTI1 via SYSCFG_EXTICR1
Unmask EXTI line 1 in EXTI_IMR
Enable falling-edge trigger on EXTI line 1 (EXTI_FTSR bit 1)
Verify EXTI_FTSR bit 1 is set; on failure print 'FAIL: NEG EDGE NOT ENABLED'
Print PASS and halt
prerequisites: Target provides RCC, GPIOA, SYSCFG, and EXTI at documented base addresses
expected_results: EXTI1 falling-edge trigger enabled and reflected in EXTI_FTSR; test prints 'GPIO NEG EDGE INTR TEST PASSED'

tests.name: GPIO rising-edge trigger enable on all pads (0..7)
tests.description: Enable EXTI rising-edge triggers on pads 0 through 7 and verify register bits set.
steps: For i from 0 to 7, set EXTI_RTSR bit i
Verify EXTI_RTSR bit i is set; on failure print 'FAIL: PEDGE ALL PADS'
Print PASS and halt
expected_results: EXTI_RTSR bits for pins 0..7 are set; test prints 'GPIO PEDGE ALL PADS TEST PASSED'

tests.name: GPIO rising-edge trigger enable on alternate pads
tests.description: Enable EXTI rising-edge triggers on alternate pads (0,2,4,6) and verify register bits set.
steps: For each pin in {0,2,4,6}, set EXTI_RTSR bit for that line
Verify EXTI_RTSR bit is set; on failure print 'FAIL: PEDGE ALT PAD'
Print PASS and halt
expected_results: EXTI_RTSR bits for pins 0,2,4,6 are set; test prints 'GPIO PEDGE ALT PADS TEST PASSED'
